description: Translator (win_*) windows and the remote translate.google.com webview. Minimal scope: only the core commands the chrome tab bar and the injected script invoke from JS (drag, resize-drag). Window destroy/close, global-shortcut, autostart and positioner are NOT here — those run Rust-side or via custom app commands (themselves guarded against remote callers by is_remote_tab), so remote pages never get them.
